Ruined Battleworn Morning Star  
 

No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 33
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +6
SV DISEASE: -5
WT: 9.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

This item is found on creatures.

Dropped by Undead Cleric on Aradune.

▲ Page top
Dropped of wandering warrior today
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2020 at 8:36 PM Rating: Decent
stef0knee
Scholar
96 posts
IVUed with box enchanter on Rizlona and ran around checking for mobs holding a mace. There are some models which carry hammers; these are going to give you FS battlehammers and not the morning star. Found 1 wandering warrior up just east of Rivervale. Charmed another mob and dotted it down. Trivial for 41 enc/druid duo.

Undead start spawning around 7pm and begin to despawn at 6am, so a fairly narrow window to work through now that the undead are properly despawning during daytime on TLPs.

Edited, Jun 24th 2020 9:38pm by stef0knee
▲ Page top

made a kith grp , best to be at CL ZL as these all spawn there, my pally used sense undead and pull them all day long, we had tow morning stars drop
which i let my cleric and druid loot were were logged at ZL

also got the druid cloak off a dreeadwolf king

18 posts
i got mine off a undead cleric at night in kithicor forrest it took the place of my sharkbone warhammer every lil bit of wisdom helps)
▲ Page top
Wandering Warrior
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2001 at 8:08 AM Rating: Decent
Runengetum
Guru
220 posts
I looted one of these from a Wandering Warrior. This is a mob that seems to spawn around the Rivervale zone line. Never seen a Wandering Warrior near the WC zone line.
Wandering Warriors are one of the easier mobs out there. They look like skeletons and are not casters. They can cause disease when they hit, but this is a proc effect as it were rather than a spell.
Wandering Warriors are Blue to me at level 45 and go down relatively easily
____________________________
Occasional EQ1 player
▲ Page top
found
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 4:00 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
i looted one of these off a undead commander. Pretty nice blunt weapon thought it might be for a quest since it was no drop, but apparently its not.
▲ Page top
Got 2 of these. How?
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2001 at 6:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752630170
6 posts
Greetings,
I got two of these yesterday with a druid friend of mine. Both dropped off "A Decaying Healer".
Here is how we got these.
There is a "mob path" that comes and stops at the door of the building to the left at the zone.So you can camp at the zone and use sense the dead or track to see if it is near. then you can pull him to the zone alone and beat him up till you convince him to give you the weapon he holds.
Here is a reminder: the mob which uses this path can either be "An Undead Cleric" or our guy "A Decaying Healer".
We killed 3 decaying healers and got 2 ruined battleworn morning stars and 1 fs morning star so it maybe their common drop.
ah btw i was 39cleric and my friend was 38druid.keep him chain stunned while your friend nukes and dots him and he is a piece o cake. otherwise be full mana before attacking for they seem to have LOTS of mana with which they nuke you with Wrath and heal themselves 3 or 4 times with Greater Healing or equivalent.
Hope this helps. Happy Hunting all.

Davaro
Erudite Cleric of Quellious.
Morell-Thule Server.
▲ Page top
found?
QuoteReply
# Dec 21 2000 at 2:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246072358
1 post
So where do you find this then?? Who drops it or how do you quest for it?
▲ Page top
RE: found?
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2000 at 3:54 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749882304
4 posts
This can drop off any undead healer in Kithicor Forest. This includes undead clerics and decaying healers (both look like ghouls). They can be found all through the zone (I think), but many can be found near the west commons zone.

The healers can get pretty nasty until they run out of mana. Then they're a piece of cake. They have roughly 1500 hp's or so (usually took me three 585 dmg nukes).

It's an uncommon drop, so unless you're lucky, be prepared to spend alot of time looking for it. I got mine after killing 20 of them. Many times, they'll be carrying FS warhammers. I got lucky when the one I killed dropped a FS hammer AND the morningstar.

If you are under level 45, I'd suggest getting help. Regardless, make your life easier and hire a tracker.
▲ Page top
RE: found?
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2001 at 9:26 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
healers are actually very easy killings, get a cleric in group, or solo as cleric.. when it starts casting its first spell start chain stunning until it goes low hp, then finish with nuke
